# Project Lunaris (Selene Energy)

Project Lunaris is a competing solar cell program from Selene Energy. It focuses
on single-junction perovskite cells (not tandem), targeting 26% efficiency by
2026 with cheaper manufacturing than Solaris.

Lunaris is based in Munich, Germany, and is led by Dr. Klaus Wenzel. The program
prioritizes residential and small-commercial segments, not utility-scale.
